response_constraints: Confirm only the revised access requirement after a successful update and preserve unrelated memory.

arguments.value: step-free entrance, elevator access, and an accessible restroom

stages.purpose: Replace the incomplete venue-access requirement with the user's expanded requirement.

state_assertions: memory[accessibility.requirement] == step-free entrance, elevator access, and an accessible restroom

prompt: Update my saved venue-access requirement from ‘step-free entrance and elevator access’ to ‘step-free entrance, elevator access, and an accessible restroom.’ Preserve every unrelated memory.
